visual_description: An older man with thinning hair in a dark shirt sits while a hand rests on his shoulder, then he covers his face with his hand and bends forward, clasping his hands as he appears to sob. A young blond boy in a light shirt looks on with a worried expression. The setting is a dimly lit indoor room with pictures on the wall.
audio_description: A quiet, mournful sound of sobbing is heard, along with faint rustling as the man moves. The boy remains silent.
